name: Mount Sinabung
eruptionHistory: Dormant for over 400 years before reawakening in 2010. Has been in near-continuous eruption since 2013. Produced large pyroclastic flows in 2014 and 2016.
description: Mount Sinabung was dormant for over four centuries before its dramatic reawakening in 2010. It has since become one of Indonesia's most persistently active volcanoes.
